Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Treasure chests in Tartarus contain {f 0 1 2}items{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 2}money{f 0 1 27}, and other loot that will make exploration easier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 1}There are {f 0 1 2}many types{f 0 1 27} of treasure chests, each with different contents inside. You especially want to keep an eye out for special items that can only be obtained from treasure chests.[n]{f 1 1}
